item.title: Building LineageOS 14.1 for the S4 value edition (GT-I9515 or jfvelte)
item.description: While there’s plenty of documentation on how to build LineageOS for officially supported devices, there’s hardly any documentation on how to build for an unofficial device and/or on systems which have <16GB RAM and a slower CPU. A lot of the workarounds might be useful for other devices as well. I’ll assume that you’re using Ubuntu 16.04, though I’m sure other distros will work with slight modifications. Installing dependencies Install some packages:
